flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brigham Young University-Hawaii fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (71.1% → 52.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Brigham Young University-Hawaii vs the 2018–2022 baseline (54.4% vs 66.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Brigham Young University-Hawaii fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Brigham Young University-Hawaii rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (62.4% → 73.5%).
